subject: [PATCH v2 05/10] nfsd: check client ownership when cancelling a copy-notify stateid

2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes a security vulnerability in the NFSv4.2 copy-notify stateid management by adding a check to ensure that only the client that created the stateid can cancel it. The fix involves comparing the creating client's ID with the requesting client's ID and returning an error if they don't match, preventing any authenticated client from freeing another client's stateid.
